meaning: n.古希腊雅典最高法院的法官
examples: But certain men adhering to him, did believe; among whom was also Dionysius, the Areopagite, and a woman named Damaris , and others with them.
Howbeit certain men clave unto him, and believed: among the which was Dionysius the Areopagite, and a woman named Damaris, and others with them.
